title: Employee Referral Program and Bonus Policy
text:
Q: How does the Employee Referral Program work and what is the bonus policy?
A: Our Employee Referral Program encourages employees to refer qualified candidates for open positions within the company. If your referral is hired and successfully completes 90 days of employment, you will receive a bonus of $1,000. To participate, please submit your referral's resume and a completed referral form to the HR department via email. Ensure that your referral mentions your name during the application process. Bonuses are processed in the payroll cycle following the completion of the 90-day period. For any questions or further details, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
